languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

languages.text: "Суровые условия рождают самые светлые сердца. Пусть взор Его обратится на Зарков и благословит этот мир на долгую жизнь внутри Империума Человечества!"
"Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"
languages.original_text: "Суровые условия рождают самые светлые сердца. Пусть взор Его обратится на Зарков и благословит этот мир на долгую жизнь внутри Империума Человечества!"

traits.locale_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"
"Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"
"Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

languages.text: 「厳しい環境は最も純粋な心を育む。ザルコフに神が目を向け、この世界に帝国の人間が長く生きるように祝福してくれることを祈る！」
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: 「厳しい環境は最も純粋な心を育む。ザルコフに神が目を向け、この世界に帝国の人間が長く生きるように祝福してくれることを祈る！」

languages.text: « Les environnements hostiles font naître les flammes les plus vives dans le cœur des humains. Puisse l'Empereur poser les yeux sur Zarkov et bénir ce monde en lui accordant une longue vie au sein de l'Imperium de l'Humanité ! »
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: « Les environnements hostiles font naître les flammes les plus vives dans le cœur des humains. Puisse l'Empereur poser les yeux sur Zarkov et bénir ce monde en lui accordant une longue vie au sein de l'Imperium de l'Humanité ! »

languages.text: "Harte Bedingungen lassen strahlende Herzen entstehen. Möge Er Seinen Blick auf Zarkov richten und diese Welt mit einem langen Leben innerhalb des Imperiums der Menschheit segnen!"
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: "Harte Bedingungen lassen strahlende Herzen entstehen. Möge Er Seinen Blick auf Zarkov richten und diese Welt mit einem langen Leben innerhalb des Imperiums der Menschheit segnen!"

languages.text: "Zorlu koşullar, en parlak kalpleri doğurur. O, bakışlarını Zarkov'a çevirsin ve bu dünyayı İnsan İmparatorluğu içinde uzun bir yaşamla kutsasın!"
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: "Zorlu koşullar, en parlak kalpleri doğurur. O, bakışlarını Zarkov'a çevirsin ve bu dünyayı İnsan İmparatorluğu içinde uzun bir yaşamla kutsasın!"

languages.text: «De condiciones inhóspitas se alzan los corazones más ardientes. ¡Que Su mirada se pose sobre Zarkov y bendiga este mundo con una larga vida como miembro del Imperium de la Humanidad!».
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: «De condiciones inhóspitas se alzan los corazones más ardientes. ¡Que Su mirada se pose sobre Zarkov y bendiga este mundo con una larga vida como miembro del Imperium de la Humanidad!».

languages.text: “严酷的环境方能锻造赤诚之心。愿祂垂目于扎尔科夫，护佑这个世界在人类帝国统治下永久存续！”
languages.original_text: "Harsh conditions give rise to the brightest of hearts. May He turn His gaze upon Zarkov and bless this world with a long life within the Imperium of Man!"

traits.locale_text: “严酷的环境方能锻造赤诚之心。愿祂垂目于扎尔科夫，护佑这个世界在人类帝国统治下永久存续！”
